'''''Reef Home''''' was a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] serving in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and in mopping up operations after the battle.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==History==
The warship was highly active in the aftermath of the battle, working in conjunction with various [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadrons to provide security and cover for the Alliance fleet in the face of repeated Imperial incursions. The vessel was named after a famous [[Reef Home City|floating city]] on the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Dac/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
When this ship was first mentioned in ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' some fans have adopted it's name for identifying the more obscure [[MC80a Star Cruiser|"wingless ''Liberty''" type]] from "regular" [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|''Liberty'' type]] MC80 Star Cruisers. This was possible because the sourcebook does not specify which type or subclass ''Reef Home'' was. When the ship made an appearance in the 2006 game ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' was depicted as the "winged" type, essentially putting an end to the debate.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
